sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_INNER_BUTTON part no. MKK-000103 supplied by 천진정석전자 to H&abyz, dated 2025/07/17.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents part approval contents including revision history, material list, QC process chart, inspection criteria references, and packaging specification for H&abyz-supplied products.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_INNER_BUTTON and model/part number is MKK-000103.
Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
Supplier is 천진정석전자 / 천진정석전자과기유한회사 and customer is H&abyz.
Revision history records Rev. 0 on 7/17/25 as 최초 제정.
Material list identifies PC/PBT ENH2900 from Sabic.
QC process chart is marked Mass-Prod. and Control Plan Category PVS.
Packaging specification states Box size 510mm X 330mm X 315mm and stacking limit of 4 boxes or fewer.

evidence.claim: The control plan document number is TDS-APQ-A-05-02.

evidence.claim: Dryer conditions are listed as 2-4h and 90~110℃.
Moisture content criterion is listed as less than 0.2.
The listed dimensional criteria include 12.5 ±0.05 and 6 ±0.06.
Packaging specification was established on 2025년 7월 17일 with revision number 0.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is FDA in metadata, but no FDA authority or jurisdiction appears in the provided source text.
No regulatory standard is explicitly identified; restricted substance names appear only as a non-use certificate column.
Revision appears as Rev. 00 on the cover and Rev. 0 in revision histories; treated as the same initial revision but recorded with cover value.
Some extracted table text contains OCR or spreadsheet conversion artifacts such as 'Produst/Part', '원제료', and fragmented drawing/table sections.
